name: View.Extra
comment:
# Conditional views

@docs viewIf, viewHiddenIf, viewJust, viewMaybe, viewIfElements

values.name: viewHiddenIf
values.comment: Add `display: none` to view if condition is _not_ met.

values.name: viewIf
values.comment: View only if condition is met.

values.name: viewIfElements
values.comment: View if resulting list has elements.
values.type: (() -> Html msg) -> List b -> Html msg

values.name: viewJust
values.comment: View value of if `Maybe` is a `Just`, otherwise show nothing.
values.type: (a -> Html msg) -> Maybe a -> Html msg

values.name: viewMaybe
values.comment:
Use a view based on the `Maybe` value.

    view : Maybe Feedback -> Html msg
    view feedback =
        div []
            [ h1 [] [ text "Feedback" ]
            , viewMaybe viewFeedback viewPlaceholder feedback
            ]
values.type: (a -> Html msg) -> (() -> Html msg) -> Maybe a -> Html msg
